ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant species */,
  "species_code" TEXT /* Code for the plant species (e.g., SAGE) */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Full name of the plant species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plant species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the plant */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the plant */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat of the plant */,
  "distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of the plant */,
  "growth_habit" TEXT /* Growth habit of the plant */,
  "flower_color" TEXT /* Flower color of the plant */,
  "leaf_type" TEXT /* Leaf type of the plant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "date_of_collection" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., greenhouse, field) */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment applied to the plants (e.g., fertilizer, pesticide) */,
  "replication" INTEGER /* Number of replicates */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant being measured */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the plant is part of */,
  "shoot_length" REAL /* Length of the shoot (cm) */,
  "shoot_weight" REAL /* Weight of the shoot without leaves (g) */,
  "diameter_at_base" REAL /* Diameter of the shoot at the base (mm) */,
  "diameter_at_tip" REAL /* Diameter of the shoot at the tip (mm) */,
  "leaf_length" REAL /* Length of the leaf (cm) */,
  "leaf_width" REAL /* Width of the leaf (cm) */,
  "root_length" REAL /* Length of the root (cm) */,
  "root_weight" REAL /* Weight of the root (g) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_measurements_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_measurements_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_growth" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth entry */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant being measured */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the plant is part of */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the growth measurement */,
  "shoot_length" REAL /* Length of the shoot (cm) */,
  "shoot_weight" REAL /* Weight of the shoot without leaves (g) */,
  "leaf_length" REAL /* Length of the leaf (cm) */,
  "leaf_width" REAL /* Width of the leaf (cm) */,
  "root_length" REAL /* Length of the root (cm) */,
  "root_weight" REAL /* Weight of the root (g) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_growth_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_growth_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the researcher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the journal */,
  "issue" INTEGER /* Issue of the journal */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Pages of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher making the request */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the request */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of data requested (e.g., growth data, measurement data) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing agreement */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher sharing the data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the agreement */,
  "agreement_type" TEXT /* Type of agreement (e.g., collaboration, data exchange) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the agreement (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher making the comment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_control" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_control_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_control_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_images_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant */,
  "video" TEXT /* Video data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_videos_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)
